title: Program Operations and Specifications epic
summary: Maintain normative specifications, evidence, task data, budgets, risks, gates, and publication.

title: Create repository and document topology
summary: Create the authoritative repository layout, document IDs, templates, and ownership boundaries.

title: Implement cross-reference and Wiki publishing convention
summary: Make document and task links stable in Git repositories and transformable for GitHub Wiki publication.

title: Normalize source archive into normative specifications
summary: Extract valid requirements and evidence from the supplied archive without retaining contradictory historical narrative.

title: Establish source and literature register
summary: Create a maintainable official-source register for architecture, hardware, legal, standards, tooling, and prior art.

title: Establish claim verification register
summary: Convert assumptions and absolute statements into bounded, testable, state-controlled claims.

title: Generate canonical task and import datasets
summary: Create tracker-neutral work data with detailed scope, acceptance, dependencies, dates, milestones, and specification links.

title: Implement document and task validators
summary: Fail CI on broken cross-references, anchors, task edges, schema drift, weak required fields, and generated-artifact mismatch.

title: Baseline roadmap, Gantt, milestones, and dependency model
summary: Publish a dependency-driven multi-track schedule that can be rendered in Markdown and Linear.

title: Baseline budget, procurement, risk, and gate registers
summary: Tie money, equipment, risks, stop criteria, and funding tranches to evidence-producing work.

title: Publish executive briefing and onboarding path
summary: Provide a decision-ready summary and reading path for engineers, partners, counsel, funders, and contributors.

title: Generate and review Wiki publication preview
summary: Create a flat GitHub-Wiki-compatible preview while preserving source IDs, anchors, links, and provenance.

title: Tag documentation baseline release
summary: Bind the normative document set, task data, source/claim/experiment registers, and validation results to a release.

title: Operate monthly documentation and tracker reconciliation
summary: Detect drift among specifications, canonical CSV, GitHub, Linear, milestones, evidence, risks, and budgets.

title: Freeze and checksum the complete HyperOS/Agent OS source corpus
summary: Freeze and checksum the complete HyperOS/Agent OS source corpus

summary: Publish the source authority and conflict map

summary: Define canonical cross-reference and anchor syntax

summary: Build the ten-volume coverage and ownership matrix

summary: Create the specialist review responsibility matrix

title: Validate glossary definitions and exact usage references
summary: Validate glossary definitions and exact usage references

summary: Implement canonical task-to-spec-to-claim traceability

title: Package the Foundation release with reproducible validation
summary: Package the Foundation release with reproducible validation

title: Reconcile Linear and GitHub imports against canonical task IDs

title: Legal, IP, and Compliance epic
summary: Establish lawful research, provenance, contracts, branding, and certification paths.

title: Establish entity, IP ownership, and confidentiality baseline
summary: Ensure founders, employees, contractors, repositories, domains, and project assets have clear ownership and authority.

title: Conduct trademark and naming clearance
summary: Clear a final or fallback project mark and prevent public use of HyperOS or another conflicting designation.

title: Approve project licenses, DCO, and contribution terms
summary: Select compatible licenses and contributor certification before accepting public code, specifications, hardware files, or data.

title: Implement source and artifact provenance controls
summary: Prevent unknown, leaked, unlicensed, or non-redistributable material from contaminating public implementation and releases.

title: Approve clean-room interoperability protocol
summary: Create role-separated lawful methods for undocumented protocol and hardware behavior work.

title: Retain software interoperability and reverse-engineering counsel
